title: Text Widget - Error Message when Updating
excerpt: We added a text widget to our board to capture updates in weekly meeting.  For the last week we have not been able add updates because an error pop’s up saying “Couldn’t Update Widget Settings”.  Everyone on our team is …

posts.author: drescheg (Guy Drescher)
posts.cookedHtml: We added a text widget to our board to capture updates in weekly meeting. For the last week we have not been able add updates because an error pop’s up saying “Couldn’t Update Widget Settings”. Everyone on our team is seeing this error. Any ideas on how to resolve this.

posts.author: Soko (Soko)
posts.cookedHtml: Same. the update is not showing up on other members’ screen.
